themes.exampleQuote: Sahil has been very kind & helpful with accepting custom orders whenever I come with my friends.
Delicious food! Authentic flavors! Must visit place.
The person taking the order has the audacity to ask if it was my first time in the US.
Tried Indian food for the first time and I loved it.
The staff were extremely rude and dismissive, which made the atmosphere feel unwelcoming.

notable_quote: Reva first opened in June 2024 and I have been a regular customer ever since; the food taste is the best you can find in Pittsburgh and no other Indian restaurant can match the level.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers consistently praise the food's authenticity and single out Sahil by name for attentive, flexible service, but a distinct cluster of negative reviews cites specific incidents of condescension from front-of-house staff that pull the sentiment reading down from what the five-star ratio alone would suggest.
quarter_narrative: Thirty independent Pittsburgh creators posted TikToks tagged at Reva this quarter, generating over 161 million total plays, and Reva itself posted zero times in the last 71 days. That gap is the defining fact of the restaurant's Spring 2026. The city is documenting this place in extraordinary volume; Reva is not acknowledging any of it. Within the Pittsburgh Asian Kitchens family, Mola holds the top spot this issue largely on the strength of creator collaboration fit, a signal Reva matches on paper but cannot convert without an active presence of its own. The rank climbs when Reva starts meeting the city's attention halfway, because the raw material is already there at a scale most restaurants never see.
tldr_read: Massive TikTok creator footprint, silent Instagram, service sentiment that undercuts an otherwise strong review base. Ones to Watch, #1 in Pittsburgh Indian Restaurants.
tldr_meaning: The conversion path is already perfect and the creator attention is extraordinary, so the ceiling on this rank is determined entirely by whether the service consistency and social presence catch up to what the city is already saying about the food.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: Number One In Indian, Carried By Creators. The Restaurant Has Yet To Answer.

playbook.headline: Restart the Instagram account immediately
playbook.action: The account has sat silent for 71 days with a 37.85 percent engagement rate and no bio; one post would reopen a signal that is functionally switched off.

playbook.headline: Address the front-of-house service pattern
playbook.action: Two separate reviews cite specific staff condescension; that friction is suppressing a sentiment reading that 527 reviews and 80 percent five-stars should otherwise push higher.

playbook.headline: Acknowledge the 30 creators already filming
playbook.action: Thirty creators have generated 161 million plays at this location with no coordination from Reva; reposting even a handful of those videos closes the gap with Mola on collab fit.
